Property.Name: Text
Property.DisplayValue: Redirecting for Authorization. Retry after successful authorization.
Property.NameValue: Redirecting for Authorization. Retry after successful authorization.
Property.Value: Redirecting for Authorization. Retry after successful authorization.

Expression.Name: CreateRedirectURL
Expression.DisplayValue: Trim( Replace( Mid( hdnErrorMessage, 50, Length( hdnErrorMessage ) - 49 ), &, & ) )

Property.Name: Message
Property.Value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected Service Instance?

Property.Name: Message
Property.Value: Are you sure you want to cancel this wizard?

Property.Name: RuleName
Property.Value: On ServiceInstance.List, when btnNew is Clicked

Property.Name: RuleFriendlyName
Property.Value: On Service Instance List, when btnNew is Clicked

Property.Name: RuleName
Property.Value: On ServiceInstance.List, when btnEdit is Clicked

Property.Name: RuleFriendlyName
Property.Value: On Service Instance List, when btnEdit is Clicked

Property.Name: Location
Property.Value: Service Instance Configuration - (When btnOpenSubform is Clicked)

Property.Name: RuleFriendlyName
Property.Value: When Service Instance Configuration subform is closing

Property.Name: RuleFriendlyName
Property.Value: When the View executed List item click

Property.Name: RuleName
Property.Value: On ServiceInstance.List, when btnRefresh is Clicked

Property.Name: RuleFriendlyName
Property.Value: On Service Instance List, when btnRefresh is Clicked

Property.Name: Message
Property.Value: Are you sure you want to generate SmartObjects for all the Service Objects in the selected Service Instance?

Property.Name: RuleName
Property.Value: On ServiceInstance.Configuration subform, on ServiceInstance.Settings View, when sgridEditSettingKeyInfo is Changed

Property.Name: Location
Property.Value: Service Instance Configuration - (Service Instance Settings - (When btnOpenSubform is Clicked))

Property.Name: RuleFriendlyName
Property.Value: On Service Instance Configuration subform, on Service Instance Settings View, when sgridEditSettingKeyInfo is Changed

Property.Name: RuleFriendlyName
Property.Value: When Service Instance List executed List item double click

Property.Name: EventID
Property.DisplayValue: When Service Instance List executed List item click

Property.Name: EventID
Property.DisplayValue: On Service Instance List, when btnEdit is Clicked
Property.NameValue: On ServiceInstance.List, when btnEdit is Clicked

Property.Name: Comments
Property.Value: Enable when btnResetObjectRightsPanel rule is removed

Property.Name: Comments
Property.Value: DO NOT REMOVE!! When changing anything on the JSON config of the Generic List, it will re-add this rule and cause unexpected behavior.

Property.Name: Comments
Property.Value: Checks if all Rights dropdown Starts with 'Inherit' or 'None', to then disable btnRemoveUser

Property.Name: Comments
Property.Value:
THIS IS A WORKAROUND: to execute another rule in order to select the Last Identity
The Refresh and Select Last Item method on the Generic List selection is done before the Refresh completes, then leaving an item in an 'un-selected' state causing the OnChange event on dropdowns to fire and setting incorrect permissions.

Property.Name: RuleName
Property.Value: When Generic List is Item Selected

Property.Name: RuleFriendlyName
Property.Value: When Generic List is Item Selected

Property.Name: Comments
Property.Value:
If SGrid CountItems = 0 disable controls
Else enable controls

Property.Name: RuleFriendlyName
Property.Value: On Service Instance Details, when ddlServiceType is Changed

Property.Name: Filter
Property.Value: <Filter isSimple="True"><Equals><Item SourceType="ObjectProperty" SourceID="ServiceInstanceGuid" DataType="Guid" /><Item SourceType="Value" DataType="Text"><SourceValue xml:space="preserve"><Item SourceType="Control" SourceSubFormID="5caf8a0b-00d1-7c0e-18c5-125b41ad1f8c" SourceInstanceID="6d7512aa-6ef3-3446-5776-76c128fb2188" SourceID="0b6bd193-ac98-cb1e-29bb-c1cd5fc93bea" DataType="Text" /></SourceValue></Item></Equals></Filter>
